{"type": "output", "task": "sparql-qa", "output": {"sparql": "PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?country WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P31 wd:Q6256 .
  ?opponentTeam wdt:P1545 ?country .
  ?opponentTeam wdt:P31 wd:Q4535 .
  ?opponentTeam wdt:P3423 wd:Q18203 .

  . MINUS {
    ?match wdt:P31 wd:Q152556 .
    ?match wdt:P2647 wd:Q63160 .
    ?match wdt:P16 wd:Q214815 , ?opponentTeam .
    ?match wdt:P1624 "India won" .
  }
